name: Pork Chops Crazy Crockpot Standing Up
recipeInstructions:
1. Stand the pork chops in the crockpot with the thin side down.
2. Sprinkle salt, pepper, and spices of your choice on top of the chops.
3. Arrange onion slices over the chops, separated into rings.
4. Place butter on top of the onions.
5. Cover and cook on LOW heat for 6 to 8 hours, or until the chops are tender and the onions are done.
6. The result will be moist, tender chops with a deep brown color as if broiled in the oven.
